openIssues.title: upstream blocker still running
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 agent-loop 维护者，我希望 replay 能稳定表达 pending gate 仍未 ready 的场景。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/daemon.ts

### MustPreserve
- supporting issue stays valid

### OutOfScope
- live merge or review execution

### RequiredSemantics
- dependency issue remains unfinished

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('self-bootstrap pending support fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add support issue fixture

## 验收
- [ ] support issue stays non-terminal

openIssues.title: merge gate still pending downstream work
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 agent-loop 维护者，我希望 pending merge gate 场景在 replay 里保持 deferred，而不是误判为 pass。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[351]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/daemon.ts

### MustPreserve
- scenario remains deterministic

### OutOfScope
- live GitHub checks API

### RequiredSemantics
- downstream issue is blocked until dependency resolves

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('self-bootstrap checks pending fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add replay fixture

## 验收
- [ ] blocked issue stays non-claimable
